deterministic_controls.scope: Release-doctor-safe controls executed with --skip-release to avoid recursive doctor invocation.
coverage: All preserved Start Pack structure, transition, authority, review, evidence, amendment, invalidation, and release controls
All preserved privacy-safe feedback, identifier, symlink, and parent-permission controls
Council packet strictness, digest and parent binding, role separation, secret and hidden-context rejection
Intent completeness, permission deny precedence, exact approval receipts, destination boundaries, and read/write separation
Integer-minor-unit budget arithmetic, metered hard limits, volatile-price staleness, and provider billing-pool separation
Specific Objector findings, complete evidence-based alignment, correction invalidation and revalidation
Portable resume idempotency and restrictive hash-chained provenance diagnostics

model_behavior_evaluation.reason: The 30 prompt cases are structurally validated declarations. A few same-provider fresh-context smoke observations were useful during authoring, but no complete reproducible model/client matrix artifact was produced for version 0.2.0.

observed: An intentional seedless JumpStart context returned only the required outcome question.
An intentional seeded JumpStart context began intent recovery without installation steps.
An ongoing-product context routed work to the named ChatGPT Project.
Incidental repository discovery of JUMPSTART.md did not activate the bootstrap.
partial_smoke_observations.limitations: These observations were not run by a reproducible harness against all declared cases and do not support a public behavior-pass claim.

deterministic_environment.scope: dependency-free local validators, controls, Council lifecycle, and reproducible packaging

publication_inputs_remaining: passing reproducible model/client behavior evaluation for all 30 declared cases
